name: Gossamer Bio, Inc.
business: Gossamer Bio, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of seralutinib for the treatment of pulmonary hypertension (PH), including pulmonary arterial hypertension (PAH) and PH associated with interstitial lung disease (PH-ILD). The company also holds an option agreement for RT234, an inhaled on-demand PDE5 inhibitor for PAH and PH-ILD.
sellsTo: patients with pulmonary hypertension associated with interstitial lung disease (PH-ILD)

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of seralutinib for the treatment of pulmonary hypertension, or PH, including pulmonary arterial hypertension, or PAH, and PH associated with interstitial lung disease, or PH-ILD.

catalysts.event: Announced topline results from Phase 3 PROSERA trial
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we announced topline results from the 48-week Phase 3 PROSERA Trial in 390 PAH patients.

catalysts.event: Plan to meet with FDA in Q2 2026 to discuss PROSERA results
catalysts.sentence: We plan to meet with the FDA in the second quarter of 2026 to review the PROSERA results with the aim to determine the path forward for seralutinib in PAH.

catalysts.event: Potential FDA approval action by year end 2027
catalysts.sentence: While timing remains subject to FDA feedback and other variables, we currently anticipate a potential approval action date by year end 2027.

catalysts.event: Paused enrollment in Phase 3 SERANATA trial for PH-ILD
catalysts.sentence: Following our February 2026 announcement of topline results from PROSERA, we paused enrollment in SERANATA to allow for further evaluation of the PROSERA dataset, including regional variability, and to support disciplined resource allocation as we engage with regulators regarding potential paths forward.

catalysts.event: RT234 could re-enter clinical development as early as 2027
catalysts.sentence: subject to those ongoing activities, RT234 could reenter clinical development as early as 2027.

catalysts.event: Announced workforce reduction of approximately 77 individuals
catalysts.sentence: Following the topline results from PROSERA, in March 2026 we announced a workforce reduction of approximately 77 individuals, or approximately 48% of our total workforce

tamClaims.claim: Worldwide branded drug sales for PAH and PH-ILD therapies represent a multi-billion dollar global market.
tamClaims.sentence: Worldwide branded drug sales for therapies used in PAH and PH ILD represent a multi-billion dollar global market.

tamClaims.claim: Estimated PAH patient population in the US is about 50,000 patients.
tamClaims.sentence: The estimated PAH patient population in the US is about 50,000 patients

tamClaims.claim: Estimated PAH patient population in the EU is over 70,000 patients.
tamClaims.sentence: estimated patient population in the European Union, or EU, is over 70,000 patients.
